top_signals.title: Head-HKEx's Bonnie Chan Says SpaceX Is An Exciting Deal
top_signals.summary: HKEx CEO Bonnie Chan about the SpaceX listing says that Chinese supply chains have a very broad coverage. She speaks with Bloomberg TV's David Ingles at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Oxford St vs the Square Mile: a tale of two cities
top_signals.summary: The Square Mile has reinvented itself in recent years, but West End politicians must stop blocking common sense if Oxford Street has a chance of mimicking the City’s success, says Andrew Teacher Back when Netflix was still posting DVDs through letterboxes, the £6m Marble Arch Mound would have handed the writers of Brass Eye and [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Einride Joins US-Listed Driverless Trucking Rivals on Nasdaq
top_signals.summary: Swedish driverless truck group Einride AB will make its trading debut in New York on Wednesday with hopes of benefiting from the investor buzz generated by SpaceX’s initial public offering later in the week.

top_signals.title: Kalshi requires traders to disclose employers to curb insider trading in sensitive markets
top_signals.summary: The prediction markets platform also introduced a risk-scoring system and whistleblower tools to ensure market integrity.
